title: Warm Italian Black Beans Crumble
description: A comforting, high-protein Italian dish that blends black beans with roasted vegetables and a cheesy breadcrumb crumble, served warm and satisfying.
instructions: Toss chopped bell pepper and zucchini with 1 tbsp olive oil, oregano, garlic powder, salt, pepper; spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes until tender and slightly caramelized.
In a small bowl, combine the remaining 1 tbsp olive oil, breadcrumbs, and Parmesan; mix until crumbs are well coated.
In a large bowl, mix cooked black beans with roasted vegetables; season with a pinch more salt and pepper if needed.
Spread bean and veggie mixture in a baking dish; top evenly with the breadcrumb-parmesan crumble.
Bake for 15 minutes or until the crumble is golden and the dish is heated through.
Remove from oven, sprinkle fresh basil, serve hot.
